system.description: An illusory double of the caster appears, and at the same time, the caster is affected as if by an invisibility spell. The caster is free to go elsewhere while the caster's double moves away. The double appears within the spell's range, but thereafter moves according to the caster's intent at the time of casting. The caster can make the figment appear superimposed perfectly over the character's own body so that observers don't notice an image appearing and the caster turning invisible. The caster and the figment can then move in different directions. The double moves at the caster's speed, can talk and gesture as if it were real, and even smells and feels real. The double cannot attack or cast spells, but it can pretend to do so.
